'''Jorrigar SoBilles''' was a prominent [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] businessman at the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After his [[Duro/Legends|homeworld's]] fall to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] in the [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]] [[Battle of Duro (Clone Wars)|Battle of Duro]], it was revealed that two corrupt [[Senator/Legends|senators]] had diverted several [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyers]] slated to serve in the defense of Duro. SoBilles led a public outcry against the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], demanding that a more concrete authority oversee the war effort.

==Appearances==
